intents.greeting: Hello! How can I help you today?
intents.order_status: I can help you track your order. Please share your order ID.
intents.refund_request: I can help with refunds. Please share your order ID and the reason for the refund.
intents.help: I am here to help. You can ask about order tracking, refunds, or general support.
intents.unknown: I am not fully sure I understood. Could you explain that in a little more detail?

contextual.order_reference_received: Thanks. I found your order reference in '{message}'. Your order is being checked now.
contextual.refund_reference_received: Thanks. I found your order reference in '{message}'. I will start the refund review process.

rag.needs_more_detail: I found related information in {sources}, but I need a little more detail to answer confidently.
